snippet.title: Frank Schultz Rehab Notes
snippet.description: Pain science education, hand therapy study notes, digital health, and life in Missoula MT. New videos every other week. Topics include pacing, goal measures, digital therapeutics, assistive tech platforms notes, fieldwork advice, Montana hiking, bouldering, and Japanese cooking. Business and collaboration: frank.schultz@Finthesiss.ai

channel.title: Frank Schultz Rehab Notes
channel.description: OTR/L at Bitterroot Rehabilitation Center in Missoula MT. Occupational therapist at assistive tech.ai. Writing and teaching about pain science, rehab practice, and evidence-based care.
channel.keywords: pain science goal measure digital therapeutics assistive tech Montana hiking bouldering Japanese cooking OTR/L rehab
